response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile full-stack and systems engineer with ~15 years of experience and genuine craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, embedded, low-latency services). However, the role is a Director-level individual contributor focused on AI strategy and requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms, plus the seniority to advise strategic customers and shape future cloud product direction. His AI exposure is recent and infrastructure-level (MCP tooling, agentic workflow support) rather than a track record of building recognized AI products, and his career trajectory is senior/staff IC, not principal/director with strategic influence. Solid engineer, but a clear mismatch for the seniority and AI-strategy emphasis of this position.
strengths: Broad ~15-year engineering range across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and high-throughput services
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development
Some current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic tooling)
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms as the role requires
Career level is senior/staff IC, not Director-level principal with strategic-advisory scope
Limited evidence of large-scale cloud product strategy or external customer/partner advisory work
